prompt: Color the comic page based on the characters and style in the second image. Then, swap the reading direction of the comic page to right-to-left. Finally, add the logo from the third image to the top right corner of the comic page.
prompt_refined:
Edit the provided comic page (image 1) according to these instructions:
1.  Apply the color palette and anime art style from the characters in image 2 to color all elements of image 1, including characters and backgrounds.
2.  Reorder the panels and text bubbles in image 1 to ensure a right-to-left reading direction across all horizontal panel arrangements.
3.  Add the 'Demon Slayer' logo from image 3 to the top-right corner of the comic page in image 1, scaled appropriately.
objects: Characters from the comic page (in anime art style with specified color palette)
Speech bubbles with text (arranged for right-to-left reading)
Snowy landscape background (in anime art style with specified color palette)
House/structures in background (in anime art style with specified color palette)
Charcoal basket (in anime art style with specified color palette)
'Demon Slayer' logo in the top-right corner
